nasb.text: And he looked at Amalek and took up his discourse and said, “Amalek was the first of the nations, But his end shall be destruction.”

esv.text: Then he looked on Amalek and took up his discourse and said, “Amalek was the first among the nations, but its end is utter destruction.”

cnv.text: 巴蘭看見了亞瑪力，就作歌，說： “亞瑪力原是列國之首， 他的結局卻是滅亡。”

ccb.text: 巴兰观看亚玛力人，并以诗歌预言说： “亚玛力原是列国之首， 但他的结局却是灭亡。”
